item.title: xemu
item.description: Free and open-source original Xbox game console emulation

item.title: Sunshine
item.description: Self-hosted game stream host for Moonlight.

item.title: RPCS3
item.description: Free and Open-source PlayStation 3 emulator/debugger

item.title: Outer Wilds Mod Manager
item.description: The mod manager for the Outer Wilds Mod Loader

item.title: osu!
item.description: Free-to-win rhythm game

item.title: The Nexus Mods app
item.description: Mod installer, creator and manager for all your popular games.

item.title: RetroArch
item.description: RetroArch is the reference frontend for the libretro API

item.title: Rare
item.description: Frontend for legendary, the open source Epic Games Launcher alternative

item.title: Naev
item.description: Naev is a 2d action/rpg space game that combines elements from the action, rpg and simulation genres.

item.title: DuckStation
item.description: Fast PlayStation 1 emulator for x86-64/AArch32/AArch64/RV64

item.title: ProtonUp-Qt
item.description: Install and manage GE-Proton and Luxtorpeda for Steam and Wine-GE for Lutris with this graphical user interface

item.title: Modrinth
item.description: Open-source mod platform, built by the community, for the community.

item.title: PCSX2
item.description: Free and open-source PlayStation 2 (PS2) emulator

item.title: pyfa
item.description: Python fitting assistant, cross-platform fitting tool for EVE Online

item.title: chiaki-ng
item.description: Open-source remote play client for PlayStation

item.title: Play!
item.description: Play! is a PlayStation2 emulator for Windows, macOS, UNIX, Android, iOS and web browser platforms

item.title: Archipelago
item.description: Archipelago provides a generic framework for developing multiworld capability for game randomizers

item.title: Cemu
item.description: Nintendo Wii U emulator

item.title: AntimicroX
item.description: Graphical program used to map gamepad keys to keyboard, mouse, scripts and macros

item.title: Prism Launcher
item.description: A custom launcher for Minecraft that allows you to easily manage multiple installations of Minecraft at once (Fork of MultiMC)

item.title: Flycast
item.description: Multi-platform Sega Dreamcast, Naomi, Naomi 2, and Atomiswave emulator derived from reicast

item.title: Ryujinx
item.description: Hard-fork of the Ryujinx project

item.title: PYDT
item.description: Civilization 5 / 6 / Beyond Earth / Old World Hotseat Multiplayer Management.

item.title: Heroic Games Launcher
item.description: A Native GOG, Amazon and Epic Games Launcher

item.title: Moonlight
item.description: Moonlight PC is an open source PC client for NVIDIA GameStream and Sunshine.

item.title: 86box
item.description: Emulator of x86-based machines based on PCem.

item.title: DevilutionX
item.description: Port of Diablo and Hellfire that strives to make it simple to run the game while providing engine improvements, bugfixes, and some optional quality of life features

item.title: Deckboard
item.description: Control your PC with your phone in easy way possible

item.title: Makoureactor
item.description: Final Fantasy VII field archive editor

item.title: Lunar
item.description: A modpack for all modern versions of Minecraft

item.title: pokete
item.description: A terminal based Pokemon like game

item.title: Beyond-All-Reason
item.description: Free Real Time Strategy Game with a grand scale and full physical simulation in a sci-fi setting.

item.title: GDLauncher
item.description: GDLauncher is a simple, yet powerful Minecraft custom launcher with a strong focus on the user experience

item.title: Flare
item.description: Fantasy action RPG using the FLARE engine
